generic_rules: Place contracts in component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, and constants; use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts; avoid implementation details.
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names when defining bounds.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence: `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`.
AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as AGREE variables.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
